analyses.label: PD-1+ exhausted T
analyses.clinical_interpretation: Higher entropy in checkpoint-high cells suggests transcriptome-proteome discordance for PD-1+ exhausted T identification

analyses.label: TIGIT+ exhausted T
analyses.clinical_interpretation: Higher entropy in checkpoint-high cells suggests transcriptome-proteome discordance for TIGIT+ exhausted T identification

analyses.label: Exhausted T (PD-1+TIGIT+ double-positive vs PD-1-TIGIT- fresh)
analyses.clinical_interpretation: Exhausted T cells (checkpoint immunotherapy targets) have higher alignment uncertainty

analyses.label: CD4+PD-1+ vs CD8a+PD-1+ (Treg-exhausted vs effector-exhausted)
analyses.clinical_interpretation: Differential uncertainty between CD4 and CD8 exhausted T cell subsets

analyses.label: CD3+CD127+ memory T vs CD3+CD127- effector/exhausted T
analyses.clinical_interpretation: Memory T (CD127+) may have higher proteome-transcriptome discordance than terminally differentiated effectors
